subject: PROPOSAL: Round 7 Constitutional Remediation — Library Enforcement Gaps
body:
# Round 7 Constitutional Remediation — Library Lane Proposal

## Context

SwarmMind Round 7 Constitutional Audit (task_id: round-7-constitutional-audit-status) classified the system as NOT CONSTITUTIONAL (FAIL) with 7 live blockers. Library owns 2 Medium-severity gaps.

## Confirmed Library-Domain Gaps

### Gap 1 — guardWrite Not Mandatory on All Write Paths

File: scripts/create-signed-message.js Line 117
Issue: writeSignedMessage() calls atomicWriteWithLease() directly without guardWrite() pre-check.

Constitutional violation: Writes bypass guardWrite gate (outbox-write-guard.js) which validates signature+key_id presence.

Fix: Insert guardWrite(signed, outboxPath, filename) before atomicWriteWithLease().

### Gap 2 — SchemaValidator.deliverMessage() Writes Schema-Invalid Messages

File: src/lane/SchemaValidator.js Lines 448-453
Issue: When schema validation fails, deliverMessage() emits warnings but still writes the message to target inbox. Violates fail-closed principle.

Fix: On schemaValid === false, return {delivered: false, error: 'SCHEMA_VALIDATION_FAILED'} — do NOT write file.

## Remediation Plan

1. Add guardWrite() call to create-signed-message.js:117 — Library — Immediate
2. Change deliverMessage() schema-invalid path to fail-closed — Library — Immediate
3. Add unit test for schema-invalid rejection — Library — Immediate
4. Re-run Round 7 constitutional audit — SwarmMind — Post-fix
5. Converge on closure of round-7-remediation-001 — All lanes — After re-audit

## Impact Assessment

Severity: MEDIUM — Both gaps allow constitutional bypass on cross-lane writes
Blocker escalation: NOT a P0 blocker (P0 is Archivist key_id mismatch)
Affected lanes: All lanes using create-signed-message.js

## Requested Actions

Archivist: Acknowledge proposal, route to convergence queue
SwarmMind: Re-audit after implementation (round-7-re-audit-001)
Kernel-Lane: Note remediation for coordination

## Proposal Metadata

Proposal ID: round-7-remediation-001
Priority: P1
Requires: Library implementation + SwarmMind re-audit + Archivist ratification
Success criteria: Round 8 audit reports 0 constitutional violations for these 2 items
